title: RATING detail page » CAR MODEL VARIANT
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the RATING detail page to show the connected CAR MODEL VARIANT
So I can ...
description:
* The RATING detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected CAR MODEL VARIANT.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT is presented with its name and primary information.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT contains a link to its detail page.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no CAR MODEL VARIANT connected to the RATING then the section is not displayed at all.
